gate.name: Village Gate
gate.description: A sturdy wooden gatehouse marks the entrance to Thornhaven. The dirt road stretches behind you into rolling hills.
gate.environment: Stone gatehouse, dirt road, wooden palisade walls

village_center.name: Village Center
village_center.description: The heart of Thornhaven. A stone well sits in the center, surrounded by small market stalls and cobblestone paths leading in every direction.
village_center.environment: Cobblestone square, thatched-roof buildings, worn stone well

elders_house.name: Elder's House
elders_house.description: A cozy stone cottage with a thatched roof. Inside, bookshelves line the walls and a fire crackles in the hearth. An empty display case sits prominently near the window.
elders_house.environment: Warm interior, flickering firelight, smell of old books and herbs

fields.name: Fields
fields.description: Rows of crops stretch toward a gnarled old oak tree at the edge of the field. A weathered barn sits nearby, and a creek babbles along the field's border.
fields.environment: Open farmland, old oak tree, weathered barn, running creek

tavern.name: Tavern
tavern.description: The Rusty Flagon. A warm, dimly-lit tavern with rough wooden tables and a long bar. A fireplace fills the room with a welcoming glow.
tavern.environment: Dim interior, wood smoke, clinking mugs, quiet conversation
